svg.title: Zarqa architecture overview
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram showing interface adapters, orchestration layer, analysis pipeline, subagents, and data sources

g.text: tx hash · intent · raw calldata → canonical form
Mode A: autonomous agent · Mode B: service dispatcher
builds task graph · manages subagent calls · synthesizes verdict
Analysis pipeline — identical in both modes
Data source layer — read-only, cached, rate-limited
every unresolvable component emits UNKNOWN + reason code
no component is silently skipped or assumed safe
